textByHash.c70ace445b5943658d321d48945d9b8a13f17254: Most certainly, you have already given me lots of nice coins.
textByHash.07a42ce83e1ec6909dbf4e3495c6f0a5cc36e8ae: Most certainly, but I must charge you the sum of 875 coins first.
textByHash.46ff196943cc0c4bd9dcc17334139e76803c6299: I'll want 875 coins to let you enter; this is a dungeon for the more wealthy discerning adventurer. Begone with you, riff raff.
textByHash.edf72e0877fdfd6608469ee6597e185b43c2cd96: Many thanks. You may now pass the door. May your death be a glorious one!
textByHash.724b7ad6937f6a8c7946a3bf40c8c0fc540825f5: It leads to a huge fearsome dungeon, populated by giants and strange dogs. Adventurers come from all around to explore its depths.
textByHash.26c4b13303ee2dca28527ffa33b9fa5da36db6ee: I know not what lies deeper in myself, for my skills in agility and woodcutting are inadequate, but I hear tell of even greater dangers deeper in.
textByHash.0f3611edfb61964b57f00db199ab39dd1b8a92d4: I suppose so, yes. My employer will let you in for free, forever, in exchange for 1,000,000 coins.
textByHash.be482a6c64658e06a44e121fda131a81f237fddd: Then perhaps you would rather pay 875 coins for one visit.
textByHash.23dcce1a8670bf8e2729a462fe25250989c639d1: Many thanks. You may now pass the door as many times as you wish, and I will not charge you again. May your death be a glorious one!
textByHash.7ac0d4f3a592a896fb4d1ab5798b245f68bd08e3: To a huge fearsome dungeon, populated by giants and strange dogs. Adventurers come from all around to explore its depths.
textByHash.4c1a77e750c3e57c442892616d4d3164a5c417fe: I know not what lies deeper in myself, for my skills in agility and woodcutting are inadequate.
textByHash.a34ba829ad80137fdb434a19e4e2f8a424d3ea21: My employer tells me it is an uncommon sort of tree called the Fyburglars tree.
textByHash.e77155981b3bc21122c4e781295fe598e98ffbe2: You have already given me lovely coins, so you may go in, and may your death be a glorious one!
textByHash.a9f79471cbb82e6203b978626224be8888125874: You have already given me lots of nice coins, you may go in.
textByHash.63e33dfdfab0ec98193f87a699193f41b9e3a197: You're not done yet! Do this for me!
textByHash.32ab42ce397348cae794e44991dfa7418cf026c5: My guard dogs can do puzzles better than that!
